name: Vincent Dining Table with 2 Chairs, Walnut and Doris Bench
description: The Vincent Dining Set and Doris Bench marry soft curves and solid wood, taking your home dining experience up a notch.​

product_details.name: special_feature
product_details.value: Table: Metal Brace Underneath Table Top

product_details.name: care
product_details.explanation:
Wooden Dining Set Care

Wooden Table Care
  • Dust with a soft, dry cloth and clean with a slightly damp cloth​.
  • Avoid abrasive cleaners and placing rough or sharp objects​ on the surface.
  • Keep furniture away from direct heat or sunlight​
  • Wipe spills immediately.
  • Use coasters or placemats where possible, to prevent discolouration of the surface.
  • Lift when moving, do not drag​.
  • Periodically check that all connections are tightly secured.
Dining Chairs & Benches Care
  • General Care
    • Do not tilt the chair backwards or forwards while seated.
    • Periodically check that all connections are tightly secured.
  • Wooden Type Care
    • Dust with a soft, dry cloth and clean with a slightly damp cloth​.
    • Avoid abrasive cleaners and placing rough or sharp objects​ on the surface.
    • Keep furniture away from direct heat or sunlight​.
    • Wipe spills immediately.
  • Upholstered Type Care
    • Avoid prolonged exposure to direct sunlight and keep furniture away from any heating source to prevent fading or discolouration.
    • Using a brush attachment, vacuum fabric seats regularly to remove any dust particles.
    • Blot spills immediately and gently with a clean white cloth. Do not rub.
    • Professional cleaning is advised for tough stains.

product_details.name: material
product_details.value: Table&Chair: Solid American Walnut Wood; Bench: Solid Rubber Wood with Dark Walnut Stain
product_details.explanation: As with all solid wood furniture, temperature and humidity changes may result in small cracks and fissures. Solid wood tends to absorb and release humidity through wood movement, shrinking the wood fibre and creating hairline cracks. However, the overall structure remains uncompromised.

product_details.name: max_bearing_support
product_details.value: Chair: 130 kg, Table: 100 kg, Bench: 8.8 kg

product_details.name: upholstery
product_details.value: Chair&Bench: PU Foam seat with Fabric

product_details.name: color_var
product_details.explanation: Due to the unique nature of each wood piece used, the wood / veneer is marked by organic knots, nicks and other visual imperfections which highlight its origins. Expect variations in woodgrains and wood color tones.

product_dimensions.name: general_dimensions
product_dimensions.value: Table: W150/180 x D80/90 x H75cm; Chair: W45 x D53 x H80.5cm; Bench: W122 x D35.5 x H48cm

product_dimensions.name: product_weight
product_dimensions.value: Chair: 6 kg, Table: 25 kg/32 kg, Bench: 8.8 kg

product_dimensions.name: packaging_dimensions
product_dimensions.explanation:
Packaging Dimensions

  • Box 1: 158x88x13.5cm (34 kg)(150cm table); 188x98x13.5cm (37 kg)(180cm table)
  • Box 2: 75.5x46.5x94.5cm (16 kg)
  • Box 3: 75.5x46.5x94.5cm (16 kg)
  • Box 4: 125x37x14cm (11.4 kg)

messages.title: Great quality, exactly what I was looking for!
messages.content: Purchased the vincent dining table online on castlery for our new home and we are really happy with it. The quality is great, smooth finish and very sturdy. Most dining tables I checked at furniture stores were shaky so I was particular about it being extra sturdy - the vincent dining table is super sturdy and well made. It was also very easy to assemble. This is my first purchase from castlery and I am already a fan - we also continued to buy chairs and bench from castlery.

messages.title: Vincent chairs
messages.content: Purchased 4 Vincent chairs to go with Theo table. My order arrived quickly and fully assembled. The chairs are dark walnut- high quality and very sturdy.

messages.title: Perfect!
messages.content: To create a dining area in a corner of my living room, I needed a not-too-large table to blend with existing furnishings. The Vincent Dining Table, with its smooth finish, rounded corners, and beautifully tapered legs fit the bill. I matched it with Carrie chairs, and when the dining set was assembled and placed, everything fit just right, seemed quite sturdy, and looked perfect! The White Glove Service was wonderful and from ordering to delivery, I have been pleased with my Castlery experience.
